description: Triggers when the user needs to request or prepare a code review — after completing a task, before merging, or after implementing a major feature
should_trigger: I just finished implementing the authentication system — how do I request a code review?
What should I include when requesting code review before merging to main?
How do I dispatch a code-reviewer subagent after completing Task 3?
I need a fresh perspective on my complex refactoring — request a review
How do I get git SHAs to include in a code review request?
Request code review after completing each task in subagent-driven development
should_not_trigger: I received code review comments — how should I respond?
Fix the bug the reviewer found in my auth module
Write a PR description for my feature branch
How do I set up GitHub branch protection rules?
